summary: Entry Status Feature (Open/Closed toggle) fully tested and working. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: toggle buttons present on each row, Lock/Unlock icons display correctly, closed entries have greyed-out styling with strikethrough, month header shows 'X closed' badge. Carry-forward correctly excludes Closed entries.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful
Backend: Create test loan with default entry_status='Open'
Backend: PATCH /api/loans/{id}/entry-status toggles to Closed
Backend: Entry status persisted in database
Backend: Toggle entry_status back to Open
Backend: Invalid entry_status value rejected with 400
Backend: Manager can toggle entry_status
Backend: Carry-forward setup - created Open, Closed, and Disbursed test loans
Backend: Set loan to Closed entry_status
Backend: Carry-forward excludes Closed and Disbursed entries
Backend: Verify Closed loan NOT carried forward
Backend: Verify Disbursed loan NOT carried forward
Backend: Create loan with default entry_status='Open'
Backend: Update loan preserves entry_status
Backend: GET loan includes entry_status field
Backend: List loans includes entry_status field
Backend: Delete loan works correctly
UI: MIS Board loads correctly
UI: Entry status toggle buttons present (7 buttons found)
UI: Toggle button click works - shows toast 'Entry marked as Closed/Open'
UI: Lock icon (red) displayed for Closed entries
UI: Lock-open icon (green) displayed for Open entries
UI: Closed entries have opacity-60 and line-through styling
UI: Month header shows '1 closed' badge
seed_data_creation: Test loans created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Entry status feature fully implemented and tested. The PATCH /api/loans/{id}/entry-status endpoint toggles between 'Open' and 'Closed'. Carry-forward (POST /api/loans/carry-forward) excludes both Closed entries and Disbursed status loans. Frontend uses lucide-lock (red) for Closed and lucide-lock-open (green) for Open entries. The first entry in Apr-2026 (Vishwa) is currently Closed. No mocked APIs.
